While most cultures abandoned the primitive [[Sword/Legends|sword]] in favor of [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]] or other weapons, the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] sometimes used '''swords''' as a badge of honor. This variant was made of the rare ore [[Chalon]], and was sharper and heavier than the typical blade. Trandoshan swords were not suitable for weapon upgrades.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
